messages.content: 中译英：业务与财务情况、股东情况和历史沿革等各类问题。
Various issues such as business and financial conditions, shareholder information, and historical background.
中译英：负责财务核查工作，负责对报告期内相关交易的合同、发票、收据、运单和记账凭证等进行核查；完成财务测试，包括大额、异常费用测试，截止性测试以及穿行测试，并收取记账凭证合演，确保逻辑准确。

Responsible for financial verification work, responsible for conducting verification of contracts, invoices, receipts, delivery notes, and accounting vouchers related to transactions during the reporting period; completing financial tests, including high-value and extraordinary expense tests, cut-off tests, and walkthrough tests, and collecting accounting vouchers for the reconciliation to ensure logical accuracy.
中译英：完成工业自动化项目的pitch book制作，详细梳理工业自动化产业链，行研发展趋势和可比公司情况，从技术先进性与可比公司进行全面对比，论证公司具有较大上市潜力

Complete the pitch book production for industrial automation projects, thoroughly outline the industrial automation value chain, conduct industry research on development trends and comparable company situations, comprehensively compare the technological advancement with comparable companies, and argue that the company has significant potential for going public.
中译英：通过various public channels, including Rongda Erjiangshen and Jianwei Data，搜集并查阅大量公司的IPO问询函及回复，完成10+各类案例问题的分析与整理，answers to 3 feedback questions在IPO问询函, approximately 30 pages, among others.

Collect and review a large number of IPO inquiry letters and responses from various public channels, including Rongda Erjiangshen and Jianwei Data. Analyze and organize case-specific questions from more than 10 cases, including answers to 3 feedback questions in the IPO inquiry letter, spanning approximately 30 pages, among others.
中译英：信用情况和其他
Credit status and others.
中译英：协助董监高拉取银行流水，通过控制表和云闪付等形式确保银行流水的完整性，对董监高的大额异常银行流水和关联交易进行整理和分析。

Assist senior management in obtaining bank statements by controlling forms such as control sheets and cloud payments to ensure the integrity of bank statements. Organize and analyze large and abnormal bank statements and related transactions of senior management.
中译英：协助上市公司董事、监事和高级管理人员拉取银行流水，通过控制表和云闪付等形式确保银行流水的完整性，对董监高的大额异常银行流水和关联交易进行整理和分析。

Assist directors, supervisors, and senior executives of listed companies in retrieving bank statements. Ensure the integrity of bank statements through control sheets and cloud payments. Organize and analyze large and abnormal bank statements and related transactions of the board members, supervisors, and senior executives.
中译英：我有机会在这里实习和求职，
I have the opportunity to intern and apply for jobs here.
润色如下内容：I will seek internships and full-time jobs there
I am actively seeking internships and full-time employment opportunities there.
中译英：香港金融业发达，有众多知名的金融企业，
Hong Kong has a developed financial industry with numerous well-known financial companies.
润色如下内容：Hong Kong has a developed financial industry with numerous well-known financial companies.
Hong Kong boasts a thriving financial industry, home to a plethora of renowned financial institutions.
